data.title: Dogecoin Price Holds Support After False Breakout: Potential Bull Run?
data.description:
Dogecoin (DOGE) has held above a crucial support zone after an earlier false breakdown, which may signal a potential bullish trend. The market demonstrated purchase demand after reverting from its previous state. Dogecoin price movement and technical analysis indicators signal that it could anticipate another bullish trend
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/17/dogecoin-price-holds-support-after-false-breakout-potential-bull-run/

data.title: Could SEC-Ripple appeals pause trigger 27% breakout in XRP price?
data.description:
Ripple (XRP) stabilized above $2. 00, exemplifying a similar pattern to the largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, Bitcoin (BTC), which holds firmly above $84,000 at the time of writing on Thursday.
source: https://www.fxstreet.com/cryptocurrencies/news/xrp-chart-signals-27-jump-after-sec-ripple-appeals-pause-and-50-million-settlement-202504170530

data.title: Ave.ai completes omnichannel deployment and officially releases iOS professional version app
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Blockchain data platform Ave.ai announced that its flagship product "Ave Pro" iOS version has officially landed on the US and Australian app stores and TestFlight test platform. This release marks the completion of the platform's full-channel product matrix for PC, mobile dual-end (iOS/Android), Telegram Bot and H5.
As a decentralized on-chain trading platform that supports 130+ public chains, Ave Pro iOS version continues the professional-level K-line analysis function of the web side, with a clearer page and more convenient transaction operation links.
The product manager of Ave.ai said: "We have always regarded the iOS version update and launch as an important layout of the global market strategy. User demand has always been the guide for Ave product iteration. I believe that users can see our efforts and sincerity in the process of using iOS products."

data.title: Gate.io Releases Limited Edition F1 Commemorative Gift Box for Its 12th Anniversary
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: To celebrate the 12th anniversary of the platform, the crypto asset trading platform Gate.io officially launched the "12th Anniversary Limited Edition Commemorative Gift Box". As the sponsor of the F1 Red Bull team, this gift box is a F1 Red Bull co-branded racing car model, which is a limited gift for global partners and guests at the Dubai event to express gratitude for long-term support and companionship, and convey the brand spirit of "12 years of walking together, opening the door together, and moving forward with a new look". It highlights the brand's cross-border innovation concept and international vision, and also reflects Gate.io's high attention to the global ecological cooperation network.

data.title: Bhutan Profits from Cryptocurrency Investments, Plans Green Mining
data.description:
According to PANews, Bhutan's capital Thimphu has reportedly earned millions in profits from cryptocurrency investments in recent years. Two senior officials confirmed that a portion of these profits has been used to pay government employees' salaries for two years.

Ujjwal Deep Dahal, CEO of Bhutan's sovereign wealth fund, Druk Holding and Investments, revealed plans to explore the use of hydropower for mining and utilizing green cryptocurrencies. The goal is to eventually eliminate the use of fossil fuels in digital currency mining. The fund, which controls Bhutan's sole power generation company, began incorporating cryptocurrencies into its investment portfolio in 2019.

data.title: 77K Ethereum Moved to Derivatives—Is Another Price Crash Looming?
data.description:
Ethereum has mirrored Bitcoin’s recent recovery trend, posting a near 10% gain over the past week. The asset had previously experienced a sharp correction, but its latest rally saw prices climb toward the $1,600 mark. However, the momentum has shown signs of slowing in the past 24 hours, with ETH slipping by around 4% to trade at $1,574 as of the time of writing. This decline comes amid renewed global macroeconomic uncertainty and shifting on-chain activity that may influence short-term market dynamics
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/77k-ethereum-moved-to-derivatives-is-another-price-crash-looming/

data.title: AI App Platform Infinity Ground Releases Agentic IDE 1.0 to Help Build Applications with Zero Code
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, AI application creative platform Infinity Ground announced the launch of Agentic IDE 1.0, which is the first intelligent development environment built natively for AI. It supports users to communicate with AI agents through natural language and generate fully functional Web3 applications without any code foundation.
Agentic IDE 1.0 supports interaction design, agent configuration, and front-end and back-end code generation. Compared with traditional development methods, it significantly improves development efficiency, lowers the threshold for creating Web3 applications, and brings more interactive innovation possibilities to creators. As the core product of Infinity Ground's vision of creating an "AI super individual", the launch of Agentic IDE 1.0 will promote the integration of AI and Web3, and help make decentralized creation more efficient and more popular.

data.title: BitMart Market Report: BTC is expected to continue to fluctuate in the short term
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to BitMart's market report on April 17, the total market value of the cryptocurrency market is 2.64 trillion US dollars, down 0.16% from the previous day. BTC fluctuated within a narrow range during the day, and the BTC ETF had a large outflow of 170 million US dollars yesterday. It is expected that BTC will continue to fluctuate in the short term; ETH is also in a narrow range of fluctuations; the comprehensive long-short ratio is 1.002, and the bullish force is at a 24-hour high; altcoins generally fell, and market funds have less interest in tokens with a market value of more than 100 million US dollars, and more hype is being made on altcoins with a market value of tens of millions of dollars.

data.title: Ethereum fees drop to five-year low as transaction volume falls
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the on-chain analysis platform Santiment, transaction costs on the Ethereum network have fallen to their lowest level in five years as activity on the blockchain is at a low point. Brian Quinlivan, marketing director of Santiment, said that the Ethereum network fee is currently about $0.168 per transaction. As fees decrease, the number of people sending ETH and interacting with smart contracts has also decreased. When many people use Ethereum, users bid higher fees to get their transactions confirmed faster, which pushes up the average cost, and when the number of transactions decreases, users do not need to bid too high fees. Therefore, the average fee will fall. This is essentially a supply and demand system. Quinlivan analyzed that from a trading perspective, low fees may hinder price rebounds; however, traders seem to be patiently waiting for the global economic uncertainty to pass before increasing the frequency of Ethereum and altcoin transactions. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 1,600 USDT with a 1.90% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 17, 2025, 05:40 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 1,600 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,601.26001 USDT, with a narrowed 1.90% increase in 24 hours.
